name: velour
description: Velour — Your AI Personal Stylist. Wardrobe management and outfit recommendation platform.

scripts.build: pnpm build:types && pnpm build:config && pnpm build:ui && pnpm build:web
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter web typecheck && pnpm --filter @velour/types typecheck && pnpm --filter @velour/ui typecheck && pnpm --filter @velour/config typecheck
